source.scope: Official-source-backed Brazil exercise-2026 annual-adjustment table for calendar-year 2025.

BR.notes: Annual-adjustment tariff tax for calendar-year 2025 on caller-confirmed tax base using the official rate and deduction table. Deduction derivation, monthly withholding and credits remain outside scope.

register.coverageSummary: Exercise-2026 annual-adjustment IRPF on caller-confirmed calendar-year 2025 tax base before credits and prior payments.
